evals.prompt: I just set up Draft on my machine. Can you list all my pages and show me the contents of the most recent one in markdown format?
evals.expected_output: Agent runs draft daemon, draft status, draft ls, identifies a page, then draft cat <id> --format markdown
expectations: Agent checks or starts the daemon with draft daemon
Agent lists pages with draft ls
Agent reads a specific page with draft cat <id>

evals.prompt: Create a new Draft page called 'Sprint 42 Retro' and add three bullet points: what went well, what didn't, and action items
evals.expected_output: Agent runs draft create then draft append with markdown bullet list via stdin
expectations: Agent creates page with draft create 'Sprint 42 Retro'
Agent appends content using draft append <id> via stdin

evals.prompt: In my Draft page abc123, the Status section is outdated. Replace it with 'Status: Complete - shipped to production on March 1st'
evals.expected_output: Agent uses draft replace with --heading to target the Status section
expectations: Agent uses draft replace command via stdin
Agent targets the correct heading with --heading 'Status'
New content includes the updated status text
